The Competition

Are you fast enough to beat the record?

Prepare your appetite! Check the details below:

Rules

  • You will have 1 hour to eat as much as you can and try to beat the record.
  • You can't leave the edge.
  • Use of cutlery is optional.

Days

Thursdays & Sundays

Every Thursdays and Sundays of the month

Time

From 19:00

Arrive 30min early.

Record so far: 43 slices

Current Record Holder: Robert Smith

Price & Details

The price to enter is: £30! If you can't beat the record, another £20 will be included on your bill.
But if you do beat the record, you will get a free Tasty-Slice t-shirt and a voucher for a free pizza on your next visit plus your name on the wall of fame!
Sudents get a 20% discount on the entry price, just show your student ID when you arrive!
To enter, just click the button below to book your place. Good luck

Book now

Contact us!

Opening times

  • Saturday: 11:00 - 23:00
  • Sunday: 12:00 - 21:00
